nasb.text: These are the journeys of the sons of Israel, by which they came out from the land of Egypt by their armies, under the leadership of Moses and Aaron.

esv.text: These are the stages of the people of Israel, when they went out of the land of Egypt by their companies under the leadership of Moses and Aaron.

cnv.text: 以下是以色列人按著他們的隊伍，在摩西和亞倫的手下，從埃及地出來以後所行的路程。

ccb.text: 以下是以色列人在摩西和亚伦的领导下离开埃及列队行军的路线。
